next_target_free_bridge.note: This theorem is exact only on the target-anchored current-family witness. The target-free selected-public-class closure is carried by the public physical-sigma and exact-Yukawa theorem artifacts, so this current-family witness is not the promotion surface.

notes: This closes the exact current-family PDG-matched running-value reconstruction on the current-family witness.
It does not by itself prove the stronger target-free physical-sheet quark lane.
theorem_statement: On the fixed exact current-family quark witness, the exact six running values are reconstructed by the ordered centered shapes and the affine sector data: m_u,m_c,m_t = exp(A_q^(cf) + delta_q^(cf) + E_u^log), m_d,m_s,m_b = exp(A_q^(cf) - delta_q^(cf) + E_d^log). Hence the current-family quark sextet is exact on this witness.
